name: booking-system-monorepo
description: Root package manager for booking system microservices

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names "gateway,booking,hotel,notification" --prefix-colors "cyan,blue,green,magenta" "cd api_gateway_service && make run" "pnpm --filter booking_service dev" "pnpm --filter hotel_service dev" "pnpm --filter notification_service dev"
scripts.db:start: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.redis.yml up -d && docker compose -f api_gateway_service/docker/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d && docker compose -f booking_service/docker/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d && docker compose -f hotel_service/docker/docker-compose.dev.yml up -d
scripts.db:stop: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.redis.yml down && docker compose -f api_gateway_service/docker/docker-compose.dev.yml down && docker compose -f booking_service/docker/docker-compose.dev.yml down && docker compose -f hotel_service/docker/docker-compose.dev.yml down
scripts.db:logs: concurrently -n "redis,gateway-db,booking-db,hotel-db" -c "magenta,cyan,blue,green" "docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.redis.yml logs -f" "docker compose -f api_gateway_service/docker/docker-compose.dev.yml logs -f" "docker compose -f booking_service/docker/docker-compose.dev.yml logs -f" "docker compose -f hotel_service/docker/docker-compose.dev.yml logs -f"
scripts.db:reset: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.redis.yml down -v && docker compose -f api_gateway_service/docker/docker-compose.dev.yml down -v && docker compose -f booking_service/docker/docker-compose.dev.yml down -v && docker compose -f hotel_service/docker/docker-compose.dev.yml down -v && pnpm db:start
